name: Klassic Kenna Burger
shortDescription: Double smashed patties, crisp lettuce, tomato, pickles, onion.
description: A balanced house burger with juicy beef, toasted bun, and the perfect amount of veggies.

name: PB + Java Burger
shortDescription: Beef patty, peanut butter glaze, espresso BBQ, lettuce, jalapenos.
description: A bold sweet-and-savory burger featuring a juicy beef patty topped with creamy peanut butter and smoky espresso-infused BBQ sauce, balanced with crisp lettuce and a kick of jalapeno.

name: Vegitaidan Burger
shortDescription: Vegetarian patty, avocado, spinach, pickled onion, lemon aioli.
description: A fresh vegetarian option with creamy avocado and a bright finish.

name: Leviathan Burger
shortDescription: Six smash patties on 8 inch buns, avocado, lettuce, tomato, onion rings, pickles, bacon, and ketchup.
description: More meal than most people can survive. Includes triple batch of hot-honey fries.

name: Classic Han Burger
shortDescription: Juicy beef patty, crisp lettuce, tomato, pickles, cucumber, onions, and house green sauce.
description: A balanced house burger with juicy beef, toasted gluten-free bun, and a bright green herb sauce that makes it stand out.
details: Served on a tasty gluten-free bun

name: Bacon Beach Burger
shortDescription: Beef patty, crispy bacon, grilled pineapple, BBQ sauce, lettuce, tomato.
description: tropical twist on a classic burger—featuring a juicy beef patty stacked with crispy bacon, sweet grilled pineapple, and rich BBQ sauce, all balanced with fresh lettuce and tomato for a perfect beachside bite.

name: House Fries
description: Crispy, golden house-cut fries with a perfectly seasoned crunch and fluffy interior—served hot and fresh, just the way comfort food should be at Three Gals.

name: Cheesy Fries
shortDescription: Crispy golden fries smothered in rich, melted cheese.
description: A comforting classic loaded with gooey cheese over hot, crispy fries—perfect for sharing or keeping all to yourself.

name: Guaco Gideon Fries
shortDescription: Crispy golden fries topped with fresh guacamole, zesty seasoning, and a bold burst of flavor.
description: A vibrant twist on a classic—hot, crispy fries loaded with creamy guacamole and finished with fresh, zesty toppings for the perfect balance of crunch and smoothness.

name: Syler Sweet Potato Fries
shortDescription: Crispy sweet potato fries with a lightly caramelized exterior and soft, fluffy center.
description: Perfectly fried sweet potato fries with a natural sweetness and a satisfying crunch—served hot and seasoned just right for a delicious twist on a classic favorite.

name: The Seth Specialty Fries
shortDescription: The Seth: a loaded basket of crispy fries piled high with jalapeños, bacon, and rich queso.
description: A house favorite named after our in-house coding legend—this fully loaded fry basket brings the heat and flavor with melty queso, crispy bacon, and spicy jalapeños on top of golden, crunchy fries.

name: Green Lemonade
shortDescription: A refreshing blend of green tea, lemon, and natural sweeteners.
description: A revitalizing drink that combines the freshness of green tea with the zesty kick of lemon.

name: OG Hot Dog
description: An original hot dog with cost efficient ingredients and unique flavor.

name: Soda
description: A refreshing soda with a crisp taste and bubbly texture.

name: Drew-Nilla Shake
shortDescription: A creamy blend of vanilla ice cream and milk.
description: A creamy and indulgent milkshake made with rich ice cream and smooth milk for a classic treat.

name: Chocolate Shake
shortDescription: A flavorful blend of chocolate ice cream and milk.
description: A rich and indulgent milkshake made with creamy chocolate ice cream and smooth milk for a delicious treat.

name: Mint Shake
shortDescription: A refreshing blend of mint and chocolate ice cream with milk.
description: A delightful milkshake made with creamy mint and chocolate ice cream and smooth milk for a refreshing treat.
